content: Phase 1: Install all backend & frontend dependencies
Phase 2: Build backend core (Auth, RBAC, Users, Outlets, Approvals, Audit, WebSocket)
Phase 2: Build backend Finance & Accounting module
Phase 2: Build backend Reporting & Export module
Phase 2: Build backend Seed Data (demo outlets + sample data)
Phase 2: Build frontend Portal Selector + Auth + Layout
Phase 2: Build frontend Management Portal (Dashboard, Admin, Finance, Inventory, Reports)
Phase 2: Build frontend Outlet Portal (Dashboard, Cash, Sales, Inventory, Petty Cash)
Phase 2: Build frontend Coming Soon portals (Kitchen, Cashier, Warehouse)
Phase 2: All user stories covered in Development
Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent
